name: personal-gateway-pages-template
description: Cloudflare Pages + D1 personal relay gateway template with admin dashboard.

scripts.check: node --check public/admin/app.js && node --check functions/_lib/auth.js && node --check functions/_lib/db.js && node --check functions/_lib/proxy.js && node --check functions/_lib/utils.js && node --check functions/[[path]].js
